description: Integrate the full Prompt Kit component catalog across the workspace, switch blank-state startup to centered chat, and scale the canvas to use more of the infinite workspace.

userStories.title: Add the missing Prompt Kit component primitives
userStories.description: As a user, I want PiDesk to ship the full Prompt Kit component catalog so the workspace can use all of the AI interaction building blocks consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Feedback Bar, File Upload, Image, Loader, Prompt Suggestion, Scroll Button, Source, Steps, and System Message components under the desktop UI layer
New components match the existing PiDesk shell styling and accessibility patterns
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Use Prompt Kit extensively in the prompt dock
userStories.description: As a user, I want the composer to feel like a full Prompt Kit surface with upload, suggestions, previews, and loading states instead of a plain textarea.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt dock uses File Upload, Prompt Suggestion, Loader, Image, Prompt Input, Prompt Input Actions, and Text Shimmer patterns together
Uploads surface as attachment chips or previews inside the dock
Suggested prompts are visible and actionable when the draft is empty
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Use Prompt Kit extensively in chat windows
userStories.description: As a user, I want chat windows to showcase the full Prompt Kit AI surface with richer transcript navigation, system surfaces, reasoning affordances, and response controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat windows use Feedback Bar, Scroll Button, Source, Steps, System Message, Loader, Thinking Bar, Reasoning, Chain of Thought, Tool, Message, Markdown, and Chat Container
Empty and streaming chat states visibly exercise the Prompt Kit surfaces without breaking real transcripts
Assistant, tool, and system messages get distinct treatments
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Files: chat-window-content.tsx, message.tsx and supporting UI primitives

userStories.title: Stop opening project notes by default and boot blank workspaces into centered chat
userStories.description: As a user, I want blank workspaces to open a centered chat window by default so the canvas starts in conversation mode instead of note mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Blank canvas no longer auto-opens the project note window
Blank canvas attempts to ensure a thread exists and opens a centered chat window once one is available
Manual note opening still works from the title bar
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Scale default window sizing and canvas framing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the infinite canvas to feel more utilized by default, with larger windows, wider spacing, and a better initial zoom level.
acceptanceCriteria: Default window width and height are increased for new windows
Default snap grid, cascade spacing, and zoom are tuned for wider canvas usage
Centered chat placement respects the visible canvas viewport
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Lock the overhaul with targeted tests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated coverage for the Prompt Kit rollout and the new startup/canvas defaults so regressions are caught quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update tests covering Prompt Kit component coverage, blank-state chat startup, and default canvas sizing/centering
Relevant integration tests fail before implementation and pass after implementation
Typecheck passes
